query: SELECT c.name, c.slug, COUNT(e.id) as total FROM categories c LEFT JOIN establishments e ON e.categoryId = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.slug ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT c.name, c.slug, COUNT(e.id) as total FROM categories c LEFT JOIN establishments e ON e.categoryId = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.slug ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 30;
